page_metadata.biotools__summary: De novo OTU-picking pipeline integrating single- and paired-end 16S sequence tags. It is designed to take Illumina paired-end sequencing reads as input and output the OTU BIOM table, together with their representative sequences and a phylogenetic tree of OTUs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: De novo OTU-picking pipeline integrating single- and paired-end 16S sequence tags. It is designed to take Illumina paired-end sequencing reads as input and output the OTU BIOM table, together with their representative sequences and a phylogenetic tree of OTUs.
